violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -New manager Michelle is going to get it.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Containers of ice cream fell onto the floor in the back walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop in the pizza prep cooler with the handle down in the product.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust buildup on the ceiling lights and vents. Floors of the kitchen under equipment and floor of the walk in freezer need cleaned.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
